empty_state.welcome_description: Select a section from the left menu to start working with agents and flows

welcome.title: Welcome
welcome.hero_subtitle: Platform for creating smart AI agents and automating business processes
welcome.intro_text: We are glad to welcome you to the Humanitec platform! Here you can create intelligent bots, automate routine tasks and connect them to your favorite communication channels - all without a single line of code.

create_bots.title: Create bots easily
create_bots.description: Visual editor and ready-made templates will allow you to launch your first bot in a matter of minutes

builder.title: Builder for complex scenarios
builder.description: Create multi-agent systems using a visual constructor and customize the logic of operation

channels.title: Multiple channels
channels.description: Connect Telegram, WhatsApp, Web Chat, API and AmoCRM - all in one place

rag.title: Knowledge Base (RAG)
rag.description: Upload documents and your bot will answer based on your data

tools.title: Rich set of tools
tools.description: Integrations with external services, file operations, API and much more

analytics.title: Analytics and monitoring
analytics.description: Track bot effectiveness, view conversation history and optimize performance

cta.title: Get started right now!
cta.text: Create your first bot or choose a ready-made solution from the store

1.title: Go to the "Bots" section
1.description: Create your first bot or choose a template from the store

2.title: Configure prompt and capabilities
2.description: Describe what your bot should do and add the necessary tools

3.title: Connect channels
3.description: Add Telegram, WhatsApp or other communication channels

4.title: Test and launch
4.description: Test the bot in the built-in chat and launch in production

leads_page.title: Landing leads
leads_page.subtitle: Requests submitted via website forms
leads_page.forbidden: This section is only available when the active company is system

tracing_page.title: Tracing (admin)
tracing_page.subtitle: Search spans in platform_tracing for platform debugging
tracing_page.forbidden: This section is only available when the active company is system
tracing_page.unavailable: PostgreSQL tracing is not available in this environment
tracing_page.facet_hint: Type at least 2 characters for field suggestions

platform_billing_page.title: Billing & usage (admin)
platform_billing_page.subtitle: Price catalog override and usage records across companies
platform_billing_page.forbidden: This section is only available when the active company is system
platform_billing_page.effective_hint: Effective prices (config merged with storage override). Read-only.
platform_billing_page.override_hint: Storage override JSON (same shape as config categories). Replaces the global override key entirely on save.
platform_billing_page.settlement_rules_hint: Document: version, application_mode (all_matching | first_win), rules[] with rule_id, match, resource_name, usage_type, quantity_from, exclusive_group, priority.
platform_billing_page.company_effective_hint: Effective prices for this company (global + company override). Read-only.
platform_billing_page.company_override_hint: JSON override for this company only (same shape as global categories).

select_company.title: Choose a company
select_company.subtitle: Pick a company to work in or create a new one
select_company.empty_text: Create your first company to get started

team_page.title: Team
team_page.empty_description: Copy the invite link and send it to a teammate
team_page.toast_invite_shared: Link sent via the share sheet
team_page.err_clipboard: Link created, but clipboard is unavailable. Open the API response and copy invite_url.

settings_page.title: Settings
settings_page.subdomain_help: Subdomain cannot be changed after creation
settings_page.oauth_info: Configure sign-in methods for your team
settings_page.sessions_placeholder: Active session list will be available in a future version
settings_page.integrations_info: Integrations connect external services to your platform

join_page.no_token_text: The invite link has no token.
join_page.needs_auth_subtitle: Sign in to accept the invitation to the company.
join_page.invalid_platform: The link is invalid. It may have been created for another platform.
join_page.network_error: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
join_page.success_already_title: You are already in the team
join_page.success_already_body: You are already a member of {{name}}.
join_page.expired_fallback: The invite link has expired. Ask for a new one.
join_page.invalid_fallback: The invite link is invalid or has been tampered with.
join_page.not_found_fallback: The company you were invited to does not exist or was deleted.
join_page.error_fallback: Unknown error. Please try again later.

api_keys_page.title: API keys
api_keys_page.subtitle: Manage keys for platform integrations
api_keys_page.info_body: The secret is shown only once when the key is created. Store it safely. If lost, create a new key.
api_keys_page.empty_description: Create your first key to integrate with the platform
api_keys_page.info_no_full_key: Full key is unavailable. It is only shown at creation.
api_keys_page.confirm_revoke: Revoke key "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.

api_key_modal.err_no_secret: Server did not return the key secret
api_key_modal.err_copy_failed: Could not copy: {{msg}}. Use HTTPS or copy manually.
api_key_modal.warning_line1: Store this key in a safe place.
api_key_modal.warning_line2: It will not be shown again.

embed_page.title: Embed widgets
embed_page.confirm_delete: Delete this widget? This cannot be undone.

embed_create_modal.flow_hint: List from the flows service for the current company
embed_create_modal.skill_default_hint: Skill: default (external flow or no skills in config).

embed_code_modal.err_copy_failed: Could not copy: {{msg}}. Use HTTPS or copy manually.
embed_code_modal.description: Paste this snippet before the closing </body> tag:

team_modal.err_owner_role: Cannot remove owner role from the company owner
team_modal.err_one_role: At least one role is required
team_modal.owner_hint: Owner role cannot be removed from the company owner
